entries.visualDescription: A scholarly gentleman with a silver-streaked goatee and round spectacles, wearing a Victorian explorer's waistcoat and a rumpled white linen shirt.
An ethereal, translucent jellyfish-like presence that floats through the scenes with bioluminescent pulses of blue and gold.
A tall, imposing figure with a dark beard and piercing sea-green eyes, wearing a tailored navy-blue coat with brass buttons and glowing teal trim.
A stout and organized man with short-cropped ginger hair, wearing a utility vest filled with vials and a waterproof leather belt.
A massive cephalopod with iridescent shifting skin, huge golden eyes, and long tentacles tipped with bioluminescent suction cups.
